prereq.note: Morning Star (Phase 0 step 36) is the Phase 0 weapon — strike + bleed. Club also works as fallback. Target: 11 Smithing Stone [1] from deposits (9 fixed pickups) + miner drops. Combined with the 1 from Church of Elleh anvil = 12 total for Morning Star +0→+3 (cost breakdown 2/4/6 per Fextralife).

Phase 0 rune farm. Accessible via Bestial Sanctum portal (Phase 0 step 40). Immobile, attack from behind. Bleed procs = 15% HP each. Torrent reset loop (rest at Fort Faroth SoG before corpse despawns). Reward: 50,000 runes per kill + 5 Dragon Hearts (Fextralife verified 2026-04-17 — prior 80K figure was incorrect). Recommended kill count and level target to be recomputed against new 50K figure.
Miners resist slash. Strike weapons break them.
Higher-tier miners. Need upgraded strike weapon.
